--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
     elevation = math.radians(elevation_deg)

     azimuth = math.radians(azimuth_deg)

     

-    # Convert spherical to cartesian (TripoSR convention: x back, y right, z up)

+    # Convert spherical to cartesian (TripoSR convention)

     camera_position = torch.tensor([

         camera_distance * math.cos(elevation) * math.cos(azimuth),

         camera_distance * math.cos(elevation) * math.sin(azimuth),

@@ -47,9 +47,10 @@
     y = torch.arange(height, dtype=torch.float32) + 0.5

     yy, xx = torch.meshgrid(y, x, indexing='ij')

     

+    # NOTE: y is flipped (negative) to match TripoSR convention (y-up in camera space)

     directions = torch.stack(

         [(xx - width / 2.0) / focal_length, 

-         (yy - height / 2.0) / focal_length, 

+         -(yy - height / 2.0) / focal_length, 

          -torch.ones_like(xx)], dim=-1

     )
